mechanics.excerpt: Finally; all Clansmen are taught from an early age t0 look down on the barbarians" of the Inner Sphere_ Clan warriors begin military training almost from the time they begin to walk and talk: With few outside influences to dis- rupt their instruction they can easily outperform Inner Sphere soldiers years their senior; That fact, coupled with their techno Iogical edge won the Clans hundreds of planets when they invaded the Inner Sphere.
